The PaymentsController casts the user-supplied 'paymentAmount' parameter directly to float with no lower-bound check. ### Details When the store has 'Allow Partial Payment on Checkout' enabled, a user can submit a payment amount of $0.00 or even a negative value, potentially marking orders as paid without a valid transaction. ### PoC _Complete instructions, including specific configuration details, to reproduce the vulnerability._ ### Impact On stores with partial payment enabled, a customer may be able to set an arbitrarily small payment amount. Gateway behavior varies — some will process $0.00 transactions, effectively giving free order fulfillment. **Remediation** ", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/craftcms/commerce/security/advisories/GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6", "https://github.com/craftcms/commerce/commit/9a88392b3074aa132a9455d4f4b582411df52c74", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/craftcms/commerce/security-advisories/GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/craftcms/commerce", "summary": "Craft Commerce: Partial Payment Amount Without Lower Bound Validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:24Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-78vr-q6cf-c7p6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.6.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/commerce"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, <= 5.6.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.11.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/commerce"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.11.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Craft Commerce: Partial Payment Amount Without Lower Bound Validation
